problem: Healthcare organizations face growing integration complexity with multiple data formats (HL7, FHIR, APIs), legacy systems, and increasing demands for AI-ready data infrastructure, creating technical debt and slowing innovation.
solution: Agent-ready healthcare interoperability platform that bridges legacy, modern, and future interoperability needs. Provides unified integration for APIs, FHIR, HL7, and other protocols while preparing data infrastructure for AI agents and automation.
